use_cases: Primary action buttons in forms and interfaces
Submit buttons for authentication and sign-in flows
Call-to-action buttons across landing and marketing pages
Interactive navigation elements requiring user confirmation
Compact icon-triggered actions in toolbars and action bars
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with Radix UI Slot and CVA, offering multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Features subtle shadow effects and smooth hover/focus transitions for visual depth. Designed as a reusable atomic component for modern web applications across SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce platforms.
